hero_subtitle: SFTY connects multi-provider screening results into structured review, escalation, and audit-ready case workflows to streamline compliance operations for digital asset businesses.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Screening results depend on manual routing
problem_description: Compliance teams face delays and inconsistencies when screening outputs from multiple providers are handled separately. This fragmentation creates gaps in escalation, review traceability, and audit-ready evidence across identity verification and screening workflows.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY connects outputs from multiple screening providers into unified review queues, automates escalation workflows, preserves audit evidence, and supports reporting to streamline identity verification and compliance operations.
workflow_title: From screening alerts to case decisions
workflow_description: SFTY normalizes provider screening outputs to route alerts through rules, reviews, case creation, decisions and preserves evidence for audit and reporting workflows.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Beyond fragmented outputs. One review layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns screening results from multiple providers into audit-ready cases, decisions and evidence, enabling clear workflows, consistent escalation and defensible reporting without replacing existing tools.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY supports VASPs managing multi-provider screening results with structured routing, audit-ready evidence and enterprise deployment for secure, governed compliance operations.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY route screening results into review workflows
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how screening alerts connect to compliance cases
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence for screening reviews is preserved
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe provider orchestration for multi-vendor screening outputs
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP screening workflows?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides a connected orchestration layer that connects screening outputs into review, escalation and reporting workflows for VASPs, improving visibility and audit readiness.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY route screening results?
faq_2_answer: SFTY normalizes and applies rules to screening results, routing alerts for manual review or escalation based on configurable policies and risk thresholds.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve screening evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs and audit-ready evidence packages to support defensible reviews and reporting workflows for screening alerts.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing providers?
faq_4_answer: Yes, SFTY connects multiple KYC, KYB, KYT and screening providers without disruption, enabling a seamless compliance workflow above existing tools.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace current screening providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above screening providers and turns their outputs into structured workflows, without replacing the underlying identity verification or screening solutions.
final_title: Connect screening results into controlled review workflows
final_description: See how SFTY routes multi-provider screening outputs into structured reviews, case escalation and audit-ready compliance evidence.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
